sections.paragraph:
ἀνθέω fut. ἀνθήσω; 1 aor. ἤνθησα; pf. ἤνθηκα LXX (Hom. et al.; also Just., A II, 11, 4 ἀνθοῦντι … προσώπῳ) bloom τὴν γῆν ἀνθοῦσαν ἀμαράντοις ἄνθεσι blooming w. unfading flowers ApcPt 5:15 (w. the dat. ἄνθος as Hom. Hymn Ap. 139).—DELG s.v. ἄνθος.

fut. fut. = fut.

aor. aor. = aorist

  1. pf. = perfect

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

ApcPt ApcPt = Apocalypse of Peter—List 1

dat. dat. = dative

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 80
